metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 77.jpg in Documents > Task 77 folder on Photos app. Turn down the brightness to -1.
metadata.context: The default brightness setting of The Eiffel Tower photo is too high

l3.rationale: Part of the Win+E shortcut to open File Explorer.

l4.rationale: Open File Explorer and browse through Documents > Task 77 to locate and open Task 77.jpg in Photos.

l5.rationale: Covers opening Photos and navigating through Documents > Task 77 to open Task ID 77.jpg before editing begins.
